independent_tests.test_output_summary: Independent test verification skipped (tests not required for scaffolding tasks)

criteria_verification.criterion_text: All 7 event model classes defined with Pydantic v2
criteria_verification.evidence: Defined BaseEvent, LLMCallEvent, ToolExecEvent, TaskStartedEvent, TaskCompletedEvent, TaskFailedEvent, WaveCompletedEvent, and GraphitiQueryEvent as Pydantic v2 BaseModel subclasses in guardkit/orchestrator/instrumentation/schemas.py
criteria_verification.notes: Defined BaseEvent, LLMCallEvent, ToolExecEvent, TaskStartedEvent, TaskCompletedEvent, TaskFailedEvent, WaveCompletedEvent, and GraphitiQueryEvent as Pydantic v2 BaseModel subclasses in guardkit/orchestrator/instrumentation/schemas.py

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Controlled vocabularies enforced via Literal types
criteria_verification.evidence: All controlled vocabularies (AgentRole, FailureCategory, PromptProfile, LLMProvider, LLMCallStatus, LLMCallErrorType, GraphitiQueryType, GraphitiStatus) are defined as Literal type aliases and used as field types. Tests verify invalid values are rejected with ValidationError for each vocabulary.
criteria_verification.notes: All controlled vocabularies (AgentRole, FailureCategory, PromptProfile, LLMProvider, LLMCallStatus, LLMCallErrorType, GraphitiQueryType, GraphitiStatus) are defined as Literal type aliases and used as field types. Tests verify invalid values are rejected with ValidationError for each vocabulary.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: BaseEvent provides common fields inherited by all events
criteria_verification.evidence: BaseEvent defines run_id, feature_id, task_id, agent_role, attempt, timestamp, schema_version. All 7 event types inherit from BaseEvent. Tests verify inheritance in TestBaseEvent.test_common_fields_inherited and per-event inherits_base_event tests.
criteria_verification.notes: BaseEvent defines run_id, feature_id, task_id, agent_role, attempt, timestamp, schema_version. All 7 event types inherit from BaseEvent. Tests verify inheritance in TestBaseEvent.test_common_fields_inherited and per-event inherits_base_event tests.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Invalid events rejected with descriptive ValidationError messages
criteria_verification.evidence: Tests verify that missing required fields, invalid controlled vocabulary values, invalid agent_role, negative tokens, and negative counts all raise ValidationError with field names in the error message. 15+ rejection tests cover all event types.
criteria_verification.notes: Tests verify that missing required fields, invalid controlled vocabulary values, invalid agent_role, negative tokens, and negative counts all raise ValidationError with field names in the error message. 15+ rejection tests cover all event types.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: schema_version field present on all events (default "1.0.0")
criteria_verification.evidence: BaseEvent defines schema_version with default='1.0.0'. TestCrossEventValidation.test_all_events_have_schema_version verifies all 7 event types have schema_version=='1.0.0'. TestBaseEvent.test_schema_version_default also confirms the default.
criteria_verification.notes: BaseEvent defines schema_version with default='1.0.0'. TestCrossEventValidation.test_all_events_have_schema_version verifies all 7 event types have schema_version=='1.0.0'. TestBaseEvent.test_schema_version_default also confirms the default.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Models support model_dump() for JSON serialization
criteria_verification.evidence: TestCrossEventValidation.test_all_events_support_model_dump verifies all 7 event types return dict from model_dump() with expected fields. Individual test classes also have model_dump_serialization tests. TestCrossEventValidation.test_zero_input_tokens_full_event verifies JSON serialization via json.dumps().
criteria_verification.notes: TestCrossEventValidation.test_all_events_support_model_dump verifies all 7 event types return dict from model_dump() with expected fields. Individual test classes also have model_dump_serialization tests. TestCrossEventValidation.test_zero_input_tokens_full_event verifies JSON serialization via json.dumps().

criteria_verification.evidence: TestLLMCallEvent.test_zero_input_tokens_valid and TestCrossEventValidation.test_zero_input_tokens_full_event both verify input_tokens=0 creates valid event. The full event test also verifies JSON serialization works with zero tokens.
criteria_verification.notes: TestLLMCallEvent.test_zero_input_tokens_valid and TestCrossEventValidation.test_zero_input_tokens_full_event both verify input_tokens=0 creates valid event. The full event test also verifies JSON serialization works with zero tokens.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unit tests cover all event types, valid/invalid cases, boundary values
criteria_verification.evidence: 72 tests organized across 9 test classes: TestBaseEvent (11), TestLLMCallEvent (21), TestToolExecEvent (6), TestTaskStartedEvent (3), TestTaskCompletedEvent (5), TestTaskFailedEvent (5), TestWaveCompletedEvent (8), TestGraphitiQueryEvent (9), TestCrossEventValidation (4). Tests cover valid creation, invalid value rejection, boundary values (zero tokens, zero counts, negative values), optional field defaults, serialization.
criteria_verification.notes: 72 tests organized across 9 test classes: TestBaseEvent (11), TestLLMCallEvent (21), TestToolExecEvent (6), TestTaskStartedEvent (3), TestTaskCompletedEvent (5), TestTaskFailedEvent (5), TestWaveCompletedEvent (8), TestGraphitiQueryEvent (9), TestCrossEventValidation (4). Tests cover valid creation, invalid value rejection, boundary values (zero tokens, zero counts, negative values), optional field defaults, serialization.
